name: deckcp-deck-making-skills
title: DeckCP deck-making skill pack
description: Interview, outline, critique, build, edit, analyze, and share great decks from Claude Code. Two tiers: provider-agnostic deck craft that works with no DeckCP account, plus DeckCP-powered skills that drive the DeckCP MCP.
principles: Scripts over tokens — deterministic bash/node does the heavy lifting for free (dedup, hashing, consistency scans, formatting).

Three model tiers, chosen per step and justified in each SKILL.md: (1) pure script wherever deterministic; (2) Haiku 4.5 subagent only for cheap mechanical classification (asset captioning, fuzzy terminology matching); (3) the user's main-loop model for real-judgment steps (interview, outline, critique, multi-lens analysis) — NOT downgraded, because the Tier-1 craft skills are the self-marketing surface.
Tier 1 is deliberately useful with no DeckCP account, so it self-markets DeckCP to people who then convert.

tiers.1: Provider-agnostic deck craft — no DeckCP account required.

skills.name: deck-interview
skills.summary: Interrogate a founder/salesperson/BD: audience, goal, the ask, proof, narrative. Willing to push back on weak positioning. Emits brief.json.

skills.name: deck-outline
skills.summary: Outline-first: turn the brief into a story spine (problem→insight→solution→proof→ask) before any slides. Emits outline.json + outline.md.

skills.name: deck-critique
skills.summary: Analyze a deck and say what's weak — narrative, clarity, the ask. Honest, specific, prioritized.

skills.name: deck-analyze-consistency
skills.summary: Script-first check of fonts/colors/spacing/terminology consistency across slides. Zero tokens for the scan; Haiku only for fuzzy terminology grouping.

skills.name: deck-analyze-visual
skills.summary: Render each slide and look at it — balance, hierarchy, contrast, density, the 5-second test.

skills.name: deck-analyze-multi
skills.summary: Run several lenses (investor, sales, skeptic, 5-second test) and synthesize a prioritized fix list.

skills.name: deck-writing-samples
skills.summary: Distill the user's voice/tone from writing samples into voice.json that later steps feed to copy.

skills.name: deckcp-gather-assets
skills.summary: Search the user's drive for images/videos, dedupe by hash, copy into ./deck-assets/, batch-upload via the MCP. Pure script.

skills.name: deckcp-build-deck
skills.summary: brief/outline → generate_outline → generate_slides_from_outline → check_slide → render_slides. Orchestration, minimal tokens.

skills.name: deckcp-brand
skills.summary: Assemble a brand brief (palette, voice, logos). NOTE: no brand-write MCP tool exists yet — produces brand-brief.json.

skills.name: deckcp-edit
skills.summary: Deterministic edit recipes: font size / theme via update_deck.deck_theme, reorder, color swap; rewrite_slide only when copy must change.

skills.name: deckcp-analyze
skills.summary: get_deck_analytics + render → a script summarizes views/dwell/engagement into a report.

skills.name: deckcp-share
skills.summary: Share/unshare a deck and set the gate using the access tools (share_deck, list_deck_access, revoke_deck_access, set_deck_share_mode).

skills.name: deckcp-install
skills.summary: Meta skill: fetch the pack from the public repo into the user's .claude/skills via the MCP install tool's fetch-and-write instructions.
